card_description: The Magnamind is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick concludes this sub-batch of Section 15 with a synthesis of the "Magnamind" theory: the universe as an AI-managed simulation that is currently being invaded and salvaged by the Urgrund."
